description: Structured index for lessons extracted from faults and experience. Each lesson is a JSON object with root cause, solution, and implementation details.

schema.category: Topic category (llm-behavior, state-management, performance, infrastructure, etc.)
schema.title: Short lesson title
schema.code_pattern: Code examples or patterns for implementation
schema.references: Links to related faults, code, documentation

note: INDEX.md is human-readable. For automation, query JSON entries directly by lesson_id.
